text.zh: 孩子平时能安静地坐着画画或看书超过15分钟吗？
text.en: Can your child sit quietly and draw or read for more than 15 minutes?

text.zh: 当您叫孩子的名字时，他/她通常会立刻转头看您吗？
text.en: When you call your child's name, do they usually turn to look at you immediately?

text.zh: 孩子在玩耍时，会主动把玩具拿给您看，或者邀请您一起玩吗？
text.en: When playing, does your child actively show you toys or invite you to play together?

text.zh: 孩子会经常重复说同一句话，或者模仿电视里的台词吗？
text.en: Does your child often repeat the same sentence or imitate lines from TV?

text.zh: 孩子在陌生的环境中，会紧紧抓住您，还是会自己去探索？
text.en: In an unfamiliar environment, does your child cling to you tightly, or do they explore on their own?
